species.name: Human
species.description: Humans are adaptable, ambitious and varied. They are often driven by legacy, survival, curiosity or the desire to prove themselves.

species.name: Elf
species.description: Elves are long-lived, perceptive and often shaped by magic, memory, beauty or the natural world. They may seem calm, distant or intensely curious.

species.name: Dwarf
species.description: Dwarves are hardy, loyal and deeply tied to craft, clan, memory and tradition. They are often difficult to intimidate or move from a chosen path.

species.name: Halfling
species.description: Halflings are small, brave and often underestimated. They are commonly warm-hearted, community-minded and surprisingly steady under pressure.

species.name: Gnome
species.description: Gnomes are clever, curious and often drawn to invention, illusion, secrets or strange knowledge. They tend to see puzzles where others see problems.

species.name: Tiefling
species.description: Tieflings carry an otherworldly legacy that often makes others suspicious of them. Many become independent, guarded or sharply self-reliant.

species.name: Dragonborn
species.description: Dragonborn are shaped by draconic ancestry, pride and presence. They often carry themselves with intensity, honour or a need to prove their strength.

species.name: Half-Elf
species.description: Half-Elves often stand between cultures, belonging fully to neither and learning to adapt. They are commonly diplomatic, independent and socially perceptive.

species.name: Half-Orc
species.description: Half-Orcs often live under the weight of other people's assumptions. Many become resilient, direct and fiercely protective of those who earn their trust.

species.name: Aasimar
species.description: Aasimar are touched by celestial power and often carry a sense of purpose, expectation or spiritual burden.

species.name: Goblin
species.description: Goblins are quick, scrappy and used to surviving in hostile places. They often rely on speed, wit, opportunism and instinct.

species.name: Orc
species.description: Orcs are powerful, enduring and often shaped by harsh lands, fierce traditions or a need to keep moving forward.

species.name: Goliath
species.description: Goliaths descend from giant ancestry and are often drawn to endurance, challenge, strength and proving themselves against impossible odds.
